text:
Once upon a time in a small village, there lived a lonely old owl named Olga. Despite her loneliness, Olga loved listening to the villagers' stories. One evening, after a long day watching the stars, she heard a tiny voice.

"Loudmouth hawk!" she screeched, unfriendly. Just your luck. Just now. Just up there.

Olga flew towards a small hawk. Just you wait; I'm going to tell you everything you want to hear...

So Olga recounted tales of adventure, of birds she'd met, and dreams she'd chased. The hawk listened intently. When Olga finished, the hawk hooted joyfully. That was incredible! Just hear me out.

You never know your friends. One fine morning...

And that's how she began another story. Olga filled the hawk's days with stories until twilight. They became great friends. Just a couple more times. Oh my. A real hero. You're amazing.

You
